official_requirements.value: Naturalisation applicants must provide both a Luxembourgish language test pass certificate and a Vivre ensemble course or exam certificate.

exam_structure.value: The official Sproochentest is taken at INLL, tests A2 oral expression and B1 oral understanding, and preparatory courses are organised by INLL, the Service de la formation des adultes, and partners.

official_certificate_scope.value: INLL states that the Sproochentest is the only recognised nationality certification and that the certificate is valid for an unlimited period.

conditional_reimbursement_route.value: The Sproochentest registration fee is EUR 75, and reimbursement claims for the test and approved-course fees can only be filed after the nationality application has been submitted.

official_course_approval_route.value: For recognised nationality-law Luxembourgish courses, the provider must be SFA-run or ministerially accredited, and qualifying certificates receive an official article-28 seal.

value: No public evidence in this rerun proves that L1 itself has ministerial accreditation or article-28-compliant status.
Reimbursement copy must distinguish the EUR 75 test fee from conditional approved-course reimbursement.
The market is not empty; no-competitor or pure-upsell framing is contradicted.
Pass-rate, market-rank, waitlist, and demand-strength claims remain unverified.

target_audience_summary.value: Adults preparing for Luxembourg naturalisation are the clearest verified audience for L1.
target_audience_summary.omission_reason: Audience phrasing is a synthesis from official-route evidence, not a direct product fact.

pricing_context.value: Observed public alternatives span free-tier messaging through roughly 745-980 EUR paid offers, but scopes vary too much to anchor a safe dashboard price claim for L1.
pricing_context.omission_reason: Useful analyst context only; not safe as a product pricing benchmark.

independent_operator_examples.name: ETIC
independent_operator_examples.evidence: Focused Luxembourg Sproochentest prep offer with public paid preparation.

independent_operator_examples.name: Lux'Languages
independent_operator_examples.evidence: Small specialist Luxembourgish prep provider with public paid positioning.

independent_operator_examples.name: LuxLessons
independent_operator_examples.evidence: Niche provider visible in the same route market with online prep messaging.

independent_operator_examples.name: Prolingua
independent_operator_examples.evidence: Broad private school with overlapping nationality and Luxembourgish offers.

pricing_or_offer_proof: Observed public alternatives span free-tier messaging through roughly 745-980 EUR paid offers.
value.social_funnel_signal: No Facebook-group-led funnel signal is captured yet in the validated evidence set.

segment_weighting.rationale: B2C product. Operator proof relevance: high. Social funnel relevance: high. Confirmed independent operators increase the weight.

value.takeaway: This is a real fragmented prep market with multiple small paid providers, not just an official route.
value.why_not_stronger: Operator presence is strong, but product-specific reimbursability and monetization are still separate questions.

independent_operator_summary.omission_reason: Derived independent-operator signal for prioritization and further market research. Keep it out of customer-facing copy until translated into product-safe language.

product_specific_reimbursability.omission_reason: Official eligibility rules are known, but no proof was found that L1 itself qualifies.

market_leadership.omission_reason: No public evidence proves a pass-rate or rank advantage.

pure_upsell_positioning.omission_reason: The public record contradicts the no-competitor framing.
